mapper.select:
SELECT Admin_Content_id, title, content, content_type, author, created_at, updated_at FROM Admin_Content where
title like CONCAT('%', #{option.keyword}, '%')
AND content_type='FAQ' and is_active = 'Y' order by Admin_Content_id desc
SELECT Admin_Content_id, title, content, content_type, author, created_at, updated_at FROM Admin_Content where Admin_Content_id = #{faqId} and is_active = 'Y' and content_type='FAQ'
